title: Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026 Government Jobs in India Apply Now

About Organization

The Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) is a government agency responsible for recruiting staff for various government departments in the state of Jharkhand.

The JSSC was established to ensure that the recruitment process for government jobs is fair, transparent, and based on merit.

About the Programme

The Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026 is a government job recruitment program aimed at filling 326 vacant posts in various government departments.

The program is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selection process will be based on a written examination and other criteria as specified by the JSSC.
